title: manilkara altissima
intro: Manilkara altissima, also known as the Sapodilla tree or Mimusops altissima, is a tropical evergreen tree native to West Africa. The bark and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Manilkara altissima include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Manilkara altissima can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
